story: Berkshire's $397B Bet Against an Overheated Market
title: Buffett's $397B Market Gamble
script: Berkshire bets 397 billion against the market. This massive hedge signals even the biggest players are nervous about an overheated market. Cheaper AI models are not translating to healthier margins due to insane token consumption rates. The industry is facing a major hurdle that requires creative problem-solving. Companies must rethink their business models to stay competitive. What will be the outcome of Berkshire's huge bet against the market and how will it impact the industry's future?
